user.title: RAPT Brewing Session Manager
user.description: Choose how this integration should receive RAPT Pill data.

bluetooth.title: RAPT Pill - Direct Bluetooth
bluetooth.description: Select a RAPT Pill discovered via Bluetooth, or enter a device ID manually. Found {devices_count} RAPT device(s).

entity.title: RAPT Pill - Home Assistant entities
entity.description: Pick the existing sensor entities that expose your RAPT Pill data (e.g. from a Shelly BLE proxy).

error.no_devices_found: No RAPT devices found via Bluetooth. Ensure your RAPT Pill is powered on and nearby, then try again.

init.title: RAPT Brewing Options
init.description: What would you like to configure?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure where brewing alerts are sent. Available services: {notification_services}

entities.title: Source entities
entities.description: Update the Home Assistant sensor entities used as the RAPT Pill data source.
